name: Italian Meatballs in Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Sauce: In a heavy saucepan cook the onion and garlic in oil over low heat, stirring for 2 minutes. Add parsley, basil, tomatoes, tomato paste, stock, wine, sugar, romano, salt, and oregano. Simmer the sauce, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes.
Meatballs: In a bowl combine bread (squeezed), ground chuck, beaten eggs, romano, parsley, garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper. Form mixture into 10 meatballs. Brown the meatballs in oil over high heat, turning often. Transfer to sauce and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 30 minutes. The dish improves in flavor if it is cooled and chilled, covered, overnight or up to 2 days.
